title: Character
description: A speaker in the narrative. Engine adapters map this to Character()/talk definitions.

displayName.description: Name shown in dialog. Empty string = narrator-style (no speaker label).

color.description: CSS color for the character's dialog. Hex or CSS named color.

sprites.description: Map of pose id to sprite asset path (relative to content/assets/).

narratId.description: Optional legacy id used by the narrat adapter if different from id.

voice.description: Reserved for future voice-acting / TTS configuration.

extensions.description: Engine-specific escape hatch. Adapters may read their own key.
